race.description: Jarrod Arentz Electrical & Solar Solutions Hcp (Bm66)
race.comment: POWERFUL TORQUE (2) hit the frame two starts ago at Mornington but ran below par last time when sixth and beaten 9 lengths over 2000m at Caulfield after being in contention on the bend. Faces an easier assignment so he is likely to play a big role. MY UNCLE DID IT (5) found one marginally better last start over 2720m at Werribee after being prominent throughout. The poor run prior in BM70 grade was the only blip in recent form, so can easily get back into the winner's stall here. AURORA RISE (9) was allowed to drift back from an outside draw last time but found the line strongly to finish sixth, beaten 2.75 lengths, over 2546m in the G3 SA Fillies Classic at Morphettville. Will appreciate this grade. VEGAS JACK (1) scored last start at Geelong to make it back-to-back wins and while this is a step up, confidence will be high. UNTETHERED (3) is back from a couple of hurdle runs but will be strong late.
